articles.title: ‘That comes with a price tag’: How snow removal is busting town budgets
articles.description:
When the February blizzard swept through Martha’s Vineyard, it knocked out a wastewater pump in Edgartown and toppled a historic harbor flagpole near where “Jaws” was filmed. These damages, on top of other snow and ice expenses, have put the town nearly $200,000 in the red for cleanup costs. Similar steep bills are piling up […]
